title: sscg bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[3.0.0-10]
- Fix IP address handling in CA certificate SAN constraints
- Resolves: RHEL-107289

[3.0.0-9]
- Ensure 'critical' basicConstraint for CA cert
- Resolves: RHEL-88119

[3.0.0-8]
- x509: Use proper version for CSR
- Resolves: RHEL-85851
full_text:
[3.0.0-10]
- Fix IP address handling in CA certificate SAN constraints
- Resolves: RHEL-107289

[3.0.0-9]
- Ensure 'critical' basicConstraint for CA cert
- Resolves: RHEL-88119

[3.0.0-8]
- x509: Use proper version for CSR
- Resolves: RHEL-85851

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20694-0.html
